brand_identity.name: OffPitch
brand_identity.visual_mood: Deep black canvases pierced by aggressive neon glows and strict grid structures.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first PWA layout. Bento grids for data density. Generous padding around distinct modules.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4 on mobile, p-6 or p-8 on desktop containers.

structures.mobile: Bottom fixed tab bar (glassmorphism), top sticky header, scrollable content area.
structures.desktop: Left sticky sidebar (w-64), right main content area. Max width 1440px.
structures.grids: Use 'Control Room' dense grids for Match Analytics (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 or 4) with gap-4 or gap-6.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (#111115), 1px subtle border (border-white/10). No soft shadows. On active, use neon 1px border with outer glow.
surface_strategies.modals: VAR Review Modal: Sharp edges, heavy backdrop blur (backdrop-blur-xl), neon magenta border, high z-index (z-50).
surface_strategies.navigation: Glassmorphism for bottom tab bar and top header to prevent content cutoff. backdrop-blur-xl with 1px top border.

component_guidelines.buttons: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-md). Solid neon background for primary (text black), transparent with neon border for secondary. Add hover:scale-105 transition.
component_guidelines.inputs: Flat dark bg, border-white/10. focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan or lime. No default outlines.
component_guidelines.tabs: Override default Shadcn tabs to have transparent backgrounds, bottom active indicator using neon colors, and remove default height constraints.
component_guidelines.squad_builder: Grid layout overlaying a pitch background. 11 clickable areas. Use plus icons with dashed borders that transition to solid glowing borders when filled.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Subtle translate-y-[-2px] and shadow glow on cards and interactive elements.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide up for tab switching.
interactions_and_motion.typing_indicator: 3 dots bouncing animation for AI chat personas.
interactions_and_motion.trivia_ticker: Crossfade transitions every 15s using Framer Motion AnimatePresence.
interactions_and_motion.spicy_mode_toggle: When toggled, background flashes subtly, toggle button glows heavily, and UI elements shift color accents to magenta/warning.

hero_background.description: Deep dark obsidian texture with subtle glowing neon grid lines for the main app background or header.

squad_pitch_bg.description: Abstract 3D neon soccer pitch for the Fantasy Tournament Squad Builder background.

var_modal_bg.description: Glitch effect neon graphic used inside or as a background for the VAR Toxicity Review modal.

ai_coach_avatar.description: Stylized cyberpunk soccer coach avatar for AI chat simulators (Jose, Pep, etc.).

player_avatar_1.description: Real player image placeholder for squad builder.

player_avatar_2.description: Real player image placeholder for squad builder.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, players, toggles) MUST have data-testid attributes in kebab-case format reflecting their role (e.g., data-testid='lock-squad-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme (#08080A base, #111115 surface). Do NOT introduce white backgrounds or light mode styles anywhere.
Incorporate the required fonts (Unbounded for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body, JetBrains Mono for numbers/stats) using Google Fonts.
Implement the Dual Responsive Layout: bottom floating tab bar for mobile, sleek left sidebar for desktop.
Use framer-motion for micro-interactions (hover scale, typing indicators, trivia crossfade).
Build out the mockData.ts exactly as specified to ensure the app is fully populated with players, matches, chat history, and trivia.
The Squad Builder pitch must utilize the `neon_soccer_pitch` image as a background layer, with 11 positioned slots overlaying it.
Implement the VAR Review toxicity check as a middleware function that triggers the high-impact glitch modal upon detecting forbidden words.
